import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut token = ""
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(ch)
      if ch == 32 or ch == 9 or ch == 10 or ch == 13
        if not string.is_empty(token)
          match string.parse_int(token)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(ch)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(token)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn remove_at(_ xs: List<Int>, _ idx: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    if i != idx
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(l1)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(l2)
    let nums = parse_ints(l1)
    match string.parse_int(string.trim(l2))
    when Some(k)
      let total = nums.len()
      let limit = if k > total
        total
      else
        k
      end
      mut remaining = nums
      mut output = ""
      mut i = 0
      while i < limit
        match list.max(remaining)
        when Some(m)
          match list.index_of(remaining, m)
          when Some(idx)
            if string.is_empty(output)
              output = "#{m}"
            else
              output = "#{output} #{m}"
            end
            remaining = remove_at(remaining, idx)
          when None
            ()
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        i = i + 1
      end
      println(output)
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
when None
  ()
end
